title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: A practical introduction to modern JavaScript: variables, functions, closures, the event loop, async/await, and the module system. By the end you'll be comfortable reading and writing real ES2022 code.

lessons.title: Values, types, and variables
lessons.content: JavaScript has seven primitive types. The rest are objects.

lessons.title: Functions and scope
lessons.content: Functions are first-class values. Closures capture the surrounding lexical environment.

lessons.title: Async / await in practice
lessons.content: Promises are values, not callbacks. async functions are syntax sugar over them.
